src/main/java/com/gsdd/adminserver/Admin.general_idea: Reorder import statements to follow a new code style convention (likely enforced by Spotless).
Remove unnecessary trailing newline at the end of the file.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/adminserver/Admin.human_impl: Deleted the empty line after the closing brace of the class.

src/test/java/com/gsdd/adminserver/Admin.general_idea: Replace empty test method with an explicit assertion to verify the application context is not null.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.6 to 3.1.5 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Update JaCoCo plugin version to 0.8.11 for compatibility with newer JDKs.
Update Maven Surefire plugin version to 3.2.2.
Update Maven Failsafe plugin version to 3.2.2.
Introduce Spotless plugin for code formatting, replacing the previous formatter.
Introduce Checkstyle plugin for code style enforcement.
Introduce OWASP Dependency-Check plugin for security scanning.
Update Spring Boot Admin server dependency version to 3.1.8.
Update Spring Cloud BOM version to 2022.0.4 (Jil release) compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add Spring Cloud Config starter dependency for configuration server support.
Simplify JaCoCo configuration by using append mode and removing explicit file paths.
Add JaCoCo check execution with minimum coverage rules.
Configure Spotless plugin for XML, properties, and Java formatting.
Configure Checkstyle plugin with specific version and dependencies.
Update test exclusion pattern from IT* to It* to match new naming convention.

.gitignore.general_idea: Regenerated the .gitignore file using a newer template source (toptal) to update IDE and OS-specific ignore patterns.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced header comments and bulk sections with output from https://www.toptal.com/developers/gitignore

.gitignore.general_idea: Added ignore rule for annotation processing test output directory.
Added ignore rule for AWS-specific IntelliJ configuration files.
Added ignore rule for SonarLint plugin data in IntelliJ.
Added ignore rule for iCloud generated files on macOS.
Added ignore rule for the .sonarqube directory used by scanners.
Ensured gradle-wrapper.properties is not ignored by adding explicit negation.
Added ignore rule for Java heap dump files.

README.md.general_idea: Update the documented Java version requirement to reflect the migration to Java 21.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Java 17' (implied or previous) to 'Java 21' in the Pre-requisites section.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for building and running the application using Docker.
README.md.human_impl: Added a 'Docker Image' section with commands for 'docker build' and 'docker run'.

sonar-project.properties.general_idea: Increment the project version number in Sonar configuration to reflect the new release cycle.
Add configuration for SonarQube authentication using an environment variable for the login token.
Update the SonarQube Java source version setting to 17 to align with the migration target.
Update the path to the JaCoCo coverage report to match the new build output structure.
Add configuration to include the Dependency-Check HTML report in SonarQube analysis.
